blended.narrative: Okemo is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
